label: Hive
description: Player-owned datacenter/base that starts as a garage.

label: Swarm
description: The player's fleet of mining hardware.

label: HoneyCoin
description: Main soft currency and bankable yield.

label: Queen
description: Central Hive intelligence and upgrade core.

label: Heat Propagation
description: Spatial heat system for racks and miners.

label: Offline Mining
description: Bees continue earning while player is away.

label: Hosting
description: Players rent rack space to other players.

label: Power
description: Electrical capacity and power draw system for the Hive.
